mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_undo_snapshot (snapshot_id, run_id, conversation_id, workspace, status, before_head, after_head, branch, before_worktree_oid, before_index_oid, after_worktree_oid, after_index_oid, changed_paths_json, changed_file_count, changed_byte_count, unavailability_reason, error_info, version, created_at, finalized_at, undone_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{snapshotId}, #{runId}, #{conversationId}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{beforeHead}, #{afterHead}, #{branch}, #{beforeWorktreeOid}, #{beforeIndexOid}, #{afterWorktreeOid}, #{afterIndexOid}, #{changedPathsJson}, #{changedFileCount}, #{changedByteCount}, #{unavailabilityReason}, #{errorInfo}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{finalizedAt}, #{undoneAt}, #{expiresAt})

INSERT INTO agent_undo_snapshot (snapshot_id, run_id, conversation_id, workspace, status, before_head, after_head, branch, before_worktree_oid, before_index_oid, after_worktree_oid, after_index_oid, changed_paths_json, changed_file_count, changed_byte_count, unavailability_reason, error_info, version, created_at, finalized_at, undone_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{snapshotId}, #{runId}, #{conversationId}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{beforeHead}, #{afterHead}, #{branch}, #{beforeWorktreeOid}, #{beforeIndexOid}, #{afterWorktreeOid}, #{afterIndexOid}, #{changedPathsJson}, #{changedFileCount}, #{changedByteCount}, #{unavailabilityReason}, #{errorInfo}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{finalizedAt}, #{undoneAt}, #{expiresAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE run_id = VALUES(run_id), conversation_id = VALUES(conversation_id), workspace = VALUES(workspace), status = VALUES(status), before_head = VALUES(before_head), after_head = VALUES(after_head), branch = VALUES(branch), before_worktree_oid = VALUES(before_worktree_oid), before_index_oid = VALUES(before_index_oid), after_worktree_oid = VALUES(after_worktree_oid), after_index_oid = VALUES(after_index_oid), changed_paths_json = VALUES(changed_paths_json), changed_file_count = VALUES(changed_file_count), changed_byte_count = VALUES(changed_byte_count), unavailability_reason = VALUES(unavailability_reason), error_info = VALUES(error_info), version = VALUES(version), finalized_at = VALUES(finalized_at), undone_at = VALUES(undone_at), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE run_id = #{runId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE workspace = #{workspace} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
